_comment: QA thresholds for the rules engine. Per-client overrides can be added under 'client_overrides' keyed by client_id. All monetary values are in the ad account currency.
_zero_spend_active_hours: Flag an ACTIVE campaign that has spent ~0 for this many hours.
_zero_spend_floor: Spend at or below this is treated as effectively zero.
_spend_no_results_min_spend: Minimum spend before an active entity with 0 results is flagged.
_cpa_over_target_multiplier: Flag when CPA exceeds target_cpa multiplied by this factor.
_roas_below_target_ratio: Flag when ROAS < target_roas * this ratio. 1.0 = strictly below target.
_roas_min_spend: Minimum spend before ROAS underperformance is evaluated.
_frequency_threshold: Flag when frequency (impressions/reach) exceeds this value.
_ctr_floor_percent: Flag when CTR (percent) falls below this floor.
_ctr_min_impressions: Minimum impressions before CTR is evaluated.
_cpm_high_multiplier: Flag an entity whose CPM exceeds the account-average CPM by this factor.
_spend_drop_percent: Flag a sudden spend drop of this fraction vs the prior snapshot (0.6 = 60% drop).
_cpa_increase_percent: Flag a sudden CPA increase of this fraction vs the prior snapshot.
_budget_cap_warning_ratio: Flag when month-to-date spend reaches this fraction of monthly_budget.
_tracking_clicks_without_results_min_cli: Flag suspected tracking issues when clicks exceed this but results are 0.
